topic_title: Ukraine and Russia exchange long-range drone strikes on energy and military infrastructure
topic_summary: Ukraine launched deep strikes against Russian gas facilities in the Orenburg region and Bashkortostan, while Russia targeted Kryvyi Rih and other Ukrainian cities with over 100 drones. Ukrainian officials report civilian casualties and damage to energy sites as both nations intensify their use of strategic aviation and long-range unmanned aerial vehicles.

findings.title: Zelensky: Currently over 100 Russian drones in sky; new attacks may occur throughout day
findings.summary: There are currently more than a hundred Russian drones in Ukrainian airspace, and further waves of drone attacks may occur throughout the day.
findings.text: Zelensky: Currently over 100 Russian drones in sky; new attacks may occur throughout day | There are currently more than a hundred Russian drones in Ukrainian airspace, and further waves of drone attacks may occur throughout the day.

findings.title: Drones strike “industrial facility” in Yaroslavl, Russia
findings.summary: Local authorities in Russia have stated that an “industrial facility” in Yaroslavl was damaged as a result of an attack by Ukrainian drones.
findings.text: Drones strike “industrial facility” in Yaroslavl, Russia | Local authorities in Russia have stated that an “industrial facility” in Yaroslavl was damaged as a result of an attack by Ukrainian drones.

findings.title: Air Defense Forces shoot down 111 of 139 Russian drones
findings.summary: Air Defense Forces shot down 111 of the 139 drones used by Russian forces to attack Ukraine since the evening of May 12.
findings.text: Air Defense Forces shoot down 111 of 139 Russian drones | Air Defense Forces shot down 111 of the 139 drones used by Russian forces to attack Ukraine since the evening of May 12.

findings.title: War update: 210 combat clashes on front line over past day, Pokrovsk and Kostiantynivka sectors remain hottest
findings.summary: On May 12, there were 210 combat engagements between Ukraine’s Defense Forces and Russian troops on the front line.
findings.text: War update: 210 combat clashes on front line over past day, Pokrovsk and Kostiantynivka sectors remain hottest | On May 12, there were 210 combat engagements between Ukraine’s Defense Forces and Russian troops on the front line.

findings.title: Russian attacks on Dnipropetrovsk region kill eight civilians, injure 11
findings.summary: Eight people have been killed and 11 others injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine’s Dnipropetrovsk region.
findings.text: Russian attacks on Dnipropetrovsk region kill eight civilians, injure 11 | Eight people have been killed and 11 others injured in Russian attacks across Ukraine’s Dnipropetrovsk region.

findings.title: Russian drones target industrial infrastructure in Odesa region
findings.summary: Russian strike drones carried out a mass attack on industrial infrastructure in Ukraine’s Odesa region overnight on May 13.
findings.text: Russian drones target industrial infrastructure in Odesa region | Russian strike drones carried out a mass attack on industrial infrastructure in Ukraine’s Odesa region overnight on May 13.

findings.title: Kharkiv hit by Russian strikes, fire reported at infrastructure site
findings.summary: Russian forces carried out two strikes on the Shevchenkivskyi and Kholodnohirskyi districts of Kharkiv, causing a fire at an infrastructure facility hit in the attack.
findings.text: Kharkiv hit by Russian strikes, fire reported at infrastructure site | Russian forces carried out two strikes on the Shevchenkivskyi and Kholodnohirskyi districts of Kharkiv, causing a fire at an infrastructure facility hit in the attack.

findings.title: Partisans report Russia moving military warehouses deep into rear areas
findings.summary: Agents of the Atesh partisan movement report a significant change in Russian logistics: warehouses storing FPV drones and ammunition are being rapidly relocated further away from the line of combat.
findings.text: Partisans report Russia moving military warehouses deep into rear areas | Agents of the Atesh partisan movement report a significant change in Russian logistics: warehouses storing FPV drones and ammunition are being rapidly relocated further away from the line of combat.

findings.title: Kremlin intensifying work with Russians abroad to conduct hybrid operations – CCD
findings.summary: Russia’s Foreign Ministry has announced plans to intensify its work with “compatriots” living abroad amid what it describes as a hybrid confrontation with the West.
findings.text: Kremlin intensifying work with Russians abroad to conduct hybrid operations – CCD | Russia’s Foreign Ministry has announced plans to intensify its work with “compatriots” living abroad amid what it describes as a hybrid confrontation with the West.

findings.title: Russia intensifies activity of strategic aviation, threat of massive strike against Ukraine remains – Ihnat
findings.summary: The Air Force of the Armed Forces of Ukraine stated that Russian strategic aviation has become more active and that aircraft are being redeployed to distant airfields, which may indicate that Russia is preparing new strikes against Ukraine. At the same time, the exact timing of a possible attack remains unknown.
findings.text: Russia intensifies activity of strategic aviation, threat of massive strike against Ukraine remains – Ihnat | The Air Force of the Armed Forces of Ukraine stated that Russian strategic aviation has become more active and that aircraft are being redeployed to distant airfields, which may indicate that Russia is preparing new strikes against Ukraine. At the same time, the exact timing of a possible attack remains unknown.

findings.title: War update: 170 combat clashes on front line, Pokrovsk and Kostiantynivka sectors remain most active
findings.summary: The enemy carried out nearly 50 attacks on Ukrainian Armed Forces positions in the Pokrovsk and Kostiantynivka directions.
findings.text: War update: 170 combat clashes on front line, Pokrovsk and Kostiantynivka sectors remain most active | The enemy carried out nearly 50 attacks on Ukrainian Armed Forces positions in the Pokrovsk and Kostiantynivka directions.

findings.title: Zelensky on strike on Kryvyi Rih: Russia continues killing Ukrainians after partial three-day silence
findings.summary: President Volodymyr Zelensky stated that two elderly people were killed in a Russian drone strike on a residential building in Kryvyi Rih, while their nine-month-old granddaughter suffered severe injuries.
findings.text: Zelensky on strike on Kryvyi Rih: Russia continues killing Ukrainians after partial three-day silence | President Volodymyr Zelensky stated that two elderly people were killed in a Russian drone strike on a residential building in Kryvyi Rih, while their nine-month-old granddaughter suffered severe injuries.

findings.title: Russians attack community in Dnipropetrovsk region with aerial bombs: Four killed, three injured
findings.summary: Russian forces struck the Dubovyky community in the Dnipropetrovsk region with aerial bombs, killing four people and injuring three others.
findings.text: Russians attack community in Dnipropetrovsk region with aerial bombs: Four killed, three injured | Russian forces struck the Dubovyky community in the Dnipropetrovsk region with aerial bombs, killing four people and injuring three others.

findings.title: Russians strike residential building in Kryvyi Rih: Two killed, infant among wounded
findings.summary: In Kryvyi Rih, Dnipropetrovsk region, a Russian attack hit a residential building, leaving people dead and injured.
findings.text: Russians strike residential building in Kryvyi Rih: Two killed, infant among wounded | In Kryvyi Rih, Dnipropetrovsk region, a Russian attack hit a residential building, leaving people dead and injured.

findings.title: 'Gray zone' on some parts of front stretches for up to 10 kilometers – Trehubov
findings.summary: Due to the active use of drones, the strike zone on the front line has expanded significantly, and the so-called "gray zone" in some sectors can now reach up to 10 kilometers. In particular, this complicates the advance of Russian troops and helps Ukrainian forces hold a number of settlements.
findings.text: 'Gray zone' on some parts of front stretches for up to 10 kilometers – Trehubov | Due to the active use of drones, the strike zone on the front line has expanded significantly, and the so-called "gray zone" in some sectors can now reach up to 10 kilometers. In particular, this complicates the advance of Russian troops and helps Ukrainian forces hold a number of settlements.

findings.title: Zelensky: Ukraine responds in kind to Russian strikes, targets gas facilities in Orenburg region
findings.summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has said that Ukraine continues to strike Russian targets in response to Russian attacks on Ukrainian territory. In particular, this concerns gas industry facilities in Russia's Orenburg region, located more than 1,500 kilometers from Ukraine.
findings.text: Zelensky: Ukraine responds in kind to Russian strikes, targets gas facilities in Orenburg region | Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has said that Ukraine continues to strike Russian targets in response to Russian attacks on Ukrainian territory. In particular, this concerns gas industry facilities in Russia's Orenburg region, located more than 1,500 kilometers from Ukraine.

findings.title: Neue ukrainische Kriegstaktik "Deep strikes" setzt Russland schwer zu
findings.summary: Lange warb Präsident Selenskyj bei den Verbündeten um Waffen mit großer Reichweite - wie etwa "Taurus". Doch inzwischen produziert die Ukraine selbst. Mit Erfolg: Russland meldet verstärkt Angriffe tief im Hinterland. Von R. Barth.
findings.text: Neue ukrainische Kriegstaktik "Deep strikes" setzt Russland schwer zu | Lange warb Präsident Selenskyj bei den Verbündeten um Waffen mit großer Reichweite - wie etwa "Taurus". Doch inzwischen produziert die Ukraine selbst. Mit Erfolg: Russland meldet verstärkt Angriffe tief im Hinterland. Von R. Barth.

findings.title: Украина нанесла удар по порту Тамань в Краснодарском крае. Власти региона сообщили о двух пострадавших и пожаре на предприятии
findings.summary: Украинские беспилотники в ночь на 13 мая атаковали порт Тамань в Краснодарском крае. Оперативный штаб региона сообщил, что обломки сбитого БПЛА «упали на территории одного из предприятий в поселке Волна Темрюкского района», где расположен порт Тамань.
findings.text: Украина нанесла удар по порту Тамань в Краснодарском крае. Власти региона сообщили о двух пострадавших и пожаре на предприятии | Украинские беспилотники в ночь на 13 мая атаковали порт Тамань в Краснодарском крае. Оперативный штаб региона сообщил, что обломки сбитого БПЛА «упали на территории одного из предприятий в поселке Волна Темрюкского района», где расположен порт Тамань.

findings.title: Россия ударила по Кривому Рогу. В городе двое погибших, пострадала девятимесячная девочка
findings.summary: Российские войска нанесли удар по Днепропетровской области, сообщили в военной администрации региона.
findings.text: Россия ударила по Кривому Рогу. В городе двое погибших, пострадала девятимесячная девочка | Российские войска нанесли удар по Днепропетровской области, сообщили в военной администрации региона.

findings.title: Война. 1539-й день. Трехдневное прекращение огня завершилось. Дроны снова атакуют. Украина предлагает «аэропортовое перемирие»
findings.summary: «Медуза» с 24 февраля 2022 года в прямом эфире рассказывает о российско-украинской войне. Мы ежедневно публикуем ваши письма, потому что уверены: о войне нужно продолжать говорить. Поделитесь с нами мыслями о войне. Какие чувства вы испытываете? Как война влияет на вашу жизнь и ваше отношение к миру? Если у вас есть история, связанная с войной, — расскажите ее. Форма для обратной связи — в конце этой статьи. Обзор предыдущего дня можно прочитать здесь.

findings.title: Украинские дроны нанесли удар по Оренбургу. Поврежден жилой дом
findings.summary: Украинские телеграм-каналы Exilenova+ и Supernova+ сообщили, что в Оренбурге произошел взрыв. По неподтвержденной информации, украинский беспилотник попал в жилой дом.
findings.text: Украинские дроны нанесли удар по Оренбургу. Поврежден жилой дом | Украинские телеграм-каналы Exilenova+ и Supernova+ сообщили, что в Оренбурге произошел взрыв. По неподтвержденной информации, украинский беспилотник попал в жилой дом.

findings.title: За время войны в России погибло более 1400 мирных жителей. От военных атак в 2026 году в среднем погибает 41 человек в месяц
findings.summary: С 2022 года в России и оккупированном Крыму из-за войны погибло не менее 1406 мирных жителей в 27 регионах. Из них 183 человека — с начала 2026-го года: это в 2,4 раза больше, чем за тот же период годом ранее. Большинство погибает от атак беспилотников. Мы собрали все известные случаи по открытым источникам и отобразили их на карте.  Иллюстрация: «Новая Газета Европа».Следить за военными атаками по территории России в реальном времени можно на интерактивной карте «Новой-Европа».   В 2025 году...

findings.title: Russia strikes Kryvyi Rih day after ceasefire ends, killing 2
findings.summary: Two people were killed and four others injured, including a 9-month-old girl hospitalized in critical condition, local authorities said.
findings.text: Russia strikes Kryvyi Rih day after ceasefire ends, killing 2 | Two people were killed and four others injured, including a 9-month-old girl hospitalized in critical condition, local authorities said.

findings.title: Ukrainian drones hit gas facility in Russia's Orenburg Oblast, Zelensky confirms
findings.summary: The attacks come after the three-day Victory Day ceasefire between Ukraine and Russia ended.
findings.text: Ukrainian drones hit gas facility in Russia's Orenburg Oblast, Zelensky confirms | The attacks come after the three-day Victory Day ceasefire between Ukraine and Russia ended.

findings.title: Russian attacks in Dnipropetrovsk region kill six after ceasefire expires, officials say
findings.summary:
Russian forces launched attacks in Ukraine's Dnipropetrovsk region on Tuesday, killing at least six people, regional officials said, after the expiry ‌of a U.S.-mediated ceasefire.
Ukrainian officials said…
